name: evaluate_offer
description: Apply the broker's negotiation policy to a carrier's counter-offer and decide whether to accept, counter, or reject. Call this every time the carrier proposes a price different from the listed rate. You MUST track and pass the current round number (1, 2, or 3). On round 3 the policy always produces a final answer — no more rounds after that.

load_id.description: The exact load_id returned by search_loads (e.g. 'L-1001').

carrier_offer.description: The USD amount the carrier just proposed. Numbers only (no '$' or commas).

round_number.description: Which negotiation round this is (1, 2, or 3). You track this yourself across the conversation — start at 1 the first time the carrier counters, increment each subsequent counter.

action.description: 'accept' = deal closed at carrier's price; 'counter' = relay counter_price to the carrier; 'reject' = walk away (round 3 only).

counter_price.description: Present only when action=counter. The price to propose back to the carrier in USD.

reasoning.description: Human-readable explanation of the decision. Do NOT read this to the carrier — it's for logs.

final.description: true = negotiation is over (accept or reject). false = another round is possible (counter). If final=true, do NOT call evaluate_offer again in this conversation.

agent_phrasing.accept: "Great, we have a deal at $X. Let me transfer you to a rep now."
agent_phrasing.counter: "I can't quite do that, but I can meet you at $X. Does that work?"
agent_phrasing.reject_final: "Unfortunately I can't go that low on this one. Thanks for calling though — feel free to reach out for future loads."

round_tracking: CRITICAL: You (the agent) must track round_number in conversation state. Increment it each time the carrier proposes a new number. Never pass round_number=0. If the carrier accepts your counter verbatim, that's an agreement — do NOT call evaluate_offer again, just transfer.

errors.400 invalid_round: round_number not in {1,2,3}. You miscounted — reset and try again.
errors.400 invalid_offer: carrier_offer is zero or negative. Re-ask the carrier for their number.
errors.404 load_not_found: load_id doesn't exist. You passed the wrong id — use the one from search_loads verbatim.

response.reasoning: Round 1: offer 2300 above floor 2208.00 but below target 2352.00; countering at midpoint.

examples.name: round 1 instant accept (carrier offered near listed rate)

response.reasoning: Round 1: offer 2360 at or above target 2352.00; instant accept.
Round 3 final: offer 2000 below floor 2208.00; walking away.
